entity.summary: Beam network decentralized exchange with a live first-party application and current spot markets for bridged stablecoins and Beam ecosystem assets.
entity.notes: The first-party JavaScript application remains reachable. Current exchange data reports recently updated markets, seven listed coins, eight trading pairs, and roughly $19,600 in 24-hour volume. HEI therefore classifies Beam Swap as active.

evidence.title: Beam Swap official application
evidence.notes: The current first-party JavaScript application remains reachable and preserves the Beam Swap trading surface.

evidence.title: Beam Swap exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange data reports seven coins, eight pairs, recently updated markets, and non-zero 24-hour volume.

evidence.title: Beam Swap exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange discovery data preserves the Beam Swap identity and swap.onbeam.com application domain.
